Title: Create a new chargeable item in the charge master with all mandatory attributes
Preconditions: Billing admin logged in with charge-master management privilege
Test_Steps: 1. Open charge master maintenance | 2. Add a new chargeable item | 3. Enter code, description, unit price, department and effective date | 4. Save
Test_Data: Code=LAB-CBC; Desc=Complete Blood Count; UnitPrice=25.00; Dept=Laboratory; EffectiveDate=2026-07-01
Expected_Result: Item is persisted and appears in charge master search with the correct active price and effective date

Title: Reject charge master item with negative unit price
Preconditions: Billing admin logged in with charge-master privilege
Test_Steps: 1. Add a new chargeable item | 2. Enter a negative unit price | 3. Attempt to save
Expected_Result: Save is blocked with a validation error that unit price must be zero or greater; no item is created

Title: Reject duplicate charge code in charge master
Preconditions: An item with code LAB-CBC already exists
Test_Steps: 1. Add a new chargeable item | 2. Enter an existing code LAB-CBC | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Save is blocked with a uniqueness violation message; no duplicate row is created

Title: Price effective-dating: future-dated price does not apply to current charges
Preconditions: Item LAB-CBC has current price 25.00; a future price 30.00 effective 2026-08-01 is configured
Test_Steps: 1. Set effective date 2026-08-01 for new price 30.00 | 2. Generate a charge dated 2026-07-15 | 3. Inspect applied price
Expected_Result: Charge uses 25.00 (active on service date); the 30.00 price is not applied until 2026-08-01

Title: Price history retains superseded prices with audit trail
Preconditions: Item LAB-CBC price changed at least once
Test_Steps: 1. Update item price | 2. Query the price history table for the item | 3. Verify prior price row retained with end date and changed-by user
Expected_Result: Prior price row is retained with end timestamp, old value, and the user who changed it; no destructive overwrite

Title: Inactivate a charge item prevents new charge creation but preserves history
Preconditions: Item LAB-CBC is active and used on past invoices
Test_Steps: 1. Inactivate item LAB-CBC | 2. Attempt to add LAB-CBC to a new invoice | 3. Open a historical invoice that used LAB-CBC
Expected_Result: New charge with LAB-CBC is blocked; historical invoice still shows the item and its original price

Title: Charge master price uses configured currency and rounding precision
Preconditions: System currency configured to USD with 2-decimal rounding
Test_Steps: 1. Enter unit price 25.005 | 2. Save | 3. Re-open item
Expected_Result: Stored price rounds to currency precision per configured rule (e.g. 25.01 half-up); display shows 2 decimals

Title: Generate itemized invoice from posted encounter charges
Preconditions: Patient has a closed visit with lab, pharmacy and consultation charges posted
Test_Steps: 1. Open the patient billing | 2. Generate invoice for the visit | 3. Review line items
Expected_Result: Invoice lists each charge as a separate line with quantity, unit price and line total; subtotal equals 87.50

Title: Invoice line total equals quantity times unit price
Preconditions: Charge master item with unit price 12.50 available
Test_Steps: 1. Add line item with quantity 3 | 2. Verify line total
Expected_Result: Line total equals 37.50; rounding matches currency precision

Title: Zero-quantity line item is rejected
Preconditions: Invoice in draft state
Test_Steps: 1. Add a line item | 2. Set quantity to 0 | 3. Attempt to save
Expected_Result: Save is blocked with validation that quantity must be at least 1; line is not added

Title: Invoice subtotal, tax and grand total reconcile
Preconditions: Draft invoice with three line items and a tax rule of 5%
Test_Steps: 1. Review subtotal | 2. Review tax | 3. Review grand total
Expected_Result: Tax equals 5.00; grand total equals 105.00; sum of line totals equals subtotal

Title: Edit a draft invoice line recalculates totals
Preconditions: Draft invoice with computed totals
Test_Steps: 1. Edit a line quantity from 1 to 4 | 2. Save | 3. Verify totals
Expected_Result: Line total and invoice subtotal, tax and grand total recompute consistently; audit records the change

Title: Finalized invoice cannot be edited; only adjustment allowed
Preconditions: Invoice in Finalized state
Test_Steps: 1. Open finalized invoice | 2. Attempt to edit a line | 3. Observe available actions
Expected_Result: Direct edit is disabled; only credit/adjustment workflow is available; original lines are immutable

Title: Voiding an invoice requires reason and is fully audited
Preconditions: Finalized unpaid invoice
Test_Steps: 1. Void the invoice | 2. Leave reason blank and confirm | 3. Enter reason and confirm | 4. Inspect audit
Expected_Result: Void without reason is blocked; void with reason sets state to Voided, reverses balance, and records user, timestamp and reason

Title: Invoice references correct patient identifiers and PHI is masked in non-clinical export
Preconditions: Invoice generated for a registered patient
Test_Steps: 1. Open invoice | 2. Export to PDF for a billing clerk role | 3. Inspect patient identifiers
Expected_Result: Invoice ties to correct patient ID; export masks PHI not required for billing per role policy; access is audit-logged

Title: Bundled service price replaces individual component prices
Preconditions: A bundle defines components Consult+CBC+Urinalysis at bundle price 70.00; individual sum is 90.00
Test_Steps: 1. Add bundle to invoice | 2. Verify components expand | 3. Verify pricing
Expected_Result: Bundle posts at 70.00; components are shown for reference but not individually priced; subtotal reflects 70.00

Title: Partial bundle: missing component blocks bundle pricing
Preconditions: Bundle requires all three components; only two performed
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt to bill the bundle | 2. Provide only two of three components
Expected_Result: Bundle price is not applied; system either unbundles to individual charges or flags incomplete bundle per rule

Title: Decision table for bundle vs unbundle pricing selection
Preconditions: Bundle and component prices configured; rule chooses lower-cost option for patient
Test_Steps: 1. Evaluate combinations of components present and payer rule | 2. Confirm selected pricing
Test_Data: R1 all present payer=bundle->bundle; R2 all present payer=itemize->items; R3 partial->items; R4 none->none
Expected_Result: Each rule resolves to the expected pricing per the decision table; no ambiguous selection

Title: Bundle component overlap with separately ordered item is not double-charged
Preconditions: CBC is both inside a bundle and ordered standalone in the same visit
Test_Steps: 1. Bill the bundle | 2. Bill standalone CBC | 3. Review invoice
Test_Data: Bundle includes CBC; standalone CBC also present
Expected_Result: System detects overlap and prevents double-charging CBC; only one CBC charge remains

Title: Apply percentage discount within authorized limit
Preconditions: Clerk authorized up to 10% discount; invoice subtotal 200.00
Test_Steps: 1. Apply 10% discount | 2. Verify discounted total
Expected_Result: Discount of 20.00 applied; total becomes 180.00 (before tax rule order); discount line is itemized

Title: Discount above authorized limit requires supervisor approval
Preconditions: Clerk limit is 10%; attempting 25%
Test_Steps: 1. Apply 25% discount | 2. Observe approval gate | 3. Supervisor approves
Expected_Result: Discount is held pending approval; total not changed until supervisor approves; approval is audited with both identities

Title: Boundary discount values at 0%, exactly at limit, and 100%
Preconditions: Clerk limit 10%
Test_Steps: 1. Apply 0% | 2. Apply exactly 10% | 3. Apply 100%
Expected_Result: 0% leaves total unchanged; 10% allowed without approval; 100% requires approval and yields zero charge with reason

Title: Fixed-amount discount cannot exceed invoice subtotal
Preconditions: Invoice subtotal 50.00
Test_Steps: 1. Apply fixed discount 75.00 | 2. Save
Expected_Result: Discount is blocked or capped at subtotal; resulting total cannot go negative

Title: Write off a small residual balance with reason code
Preconditions: Invoice has residual balance of 0.45 after payment
Test_Steps: 1. Initiate write-off | 2. Select reason code small-balance | 3. Confirm
Expected_Result: Balance is written off to zero; a write-off transaction with reason and approver is recorded; GL category captured

Title: Write-off requires reason code and approval above threshold
Preconditions: Write-off threshold for approval is 100.00
Test_Steps: 1. Write off 250.00 without reason | 2. Add reason but no approval | 3. Add approval
Expected_Result: Write-off without reason blocked; above threshold requires approval; only fully authorized write-off posts

Title: Create installment plan splitting balance into equal payments
Preconditions: Invoice balance 600.00; patient eligible for plan
Test_Steps: 1. Create payment plan | 2. Set 6 monthly installments | 3. Confirm schedule
Expected_Result: Six installments of 100.00 are scheduled with due dates; plan total equals outstanding balance

Title: Installment rounding distributes remainder to final payment
Preconditions: Balance 100.00 split into 3 installments
Test_Steps: 1. Create plan with 3 installments | 2. Review amounts
Expected_Result: Installments are 33.33, 33.33 and 33.34 (or per rule); sum equals 100.00 with no lost cents

Title: Missed installment transitions plan to delinquent state
Preconditions: Active plan with an installment due yesterday and unpaid
Test_Steps: 1. Advance system date past due date | 2. Run delinquency job | 3. Inspect plan status
Expected_Result: Plan transitions Active->Delinquent; overdue flag set; configured notification queued

Title: Early payoff of a plan closes remaining installments
Preconditions: Active plan with 4 of 6 installments remaining
Test_Steps: 1. Pay full remaining balance | 2. Inspect plan
Expected_Result: Plan transitions to Paid/Closed; future installments are cancelled; no extra charges accrue

Title: Pairwise coverage of plan terms, frequency and down payment
Preconditions: Plan engine supports term, frequency, down payment combinations
Test_Steps: 1. Configure plan with each pairwise combination | 2. Verify schedule generation
Expected_Result: Each pairwise combination produces a valid schedule whose installments plus down payment equal the balance

Title: Apply partial payment and verify outstanding balance
Preconditions: Finalized invoice with grand total 105.00
Test_Steps: 1. Record payment of 50.00 | 2. Verify balance | 3. Verify receipt
Expected_Result: Outstanding balance becomes 55.00; receipt issued with payment method and reference; transaction audited

Title: Overpayment creates patient credit balance
Preconditions: Invoice balance 105.00
Test_Steps: 1. Record payment of 120.00 | 2. Inspect account
Expected_Result: Invoice marked Paid; 15.00 recorded as credit on patient account, not negative invoice balance

Title: Reject payment with future-dated or invalid date
Preconditions: Payment entry form open
Test_Steps: 1. Enter a payment dated next month | 2. Enter a malformed date | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Future-dated payment blocked per policy; malformed date rejected; no transaction posts

Title: Generate patient statement aggregating multiple invoices
Preconditions: Patient has two finalized invoices with balances
Test_Steps: 1. Generate statement for the patient | 2. Review listed invoices and balances
Expected_Result: Statement lists both invoices, payments applied, and a total amount due of 85.00 with statement date

Title: Statement reflects payments and adjustments posted before statement date only
Preconditions: Payment posted after the statement cut-off date
Test_Steps: 1. Set statement date to 2026-06-30 | 2. Post a payment dated 2026-07-01 | 3. Generate statement
Expected_Result: Statement excludes the post-cutoff payment; balance reflects only transactions through cutoff

Title: Aging buckets classify balances by days outstanding
Preconditions: Invoices with varied ages relative to current date
Test_Steps: 1. Run aging report | 2. Verify each invoice maps to its bucket
Expected_Result: Each invoice is placed in the correct aging bucket; bucket totals sum to total receivables

Title: Aging bucket boundary at exactly 30 and 60 days
Preconditions: Invoices aged exactly 30 and 60 days
Test_Steps: 1. Run aging on invoices at exact boundaries | 2. Verify bucket assignment
Test_Data: Ages=30d and 60d; Buckets per rule inclusive of lower bound
Expected_Result: Boundary invoices fall in the bucket per the documented inclusive/exclusive rule; no invoice double-counted

Title: Partial payment re-ages the residual balance per policy
Preconditions: Invoice aged 50 days with partial payment today
Test_Steps: 1. Apply partial payment | 2. Re-run aging
Expected_Result: Residual balance retains original aging or re-ages per configured policy consistently; report documents which

Title: Process refund for an overpaid paid invoice
Preconditions: Invoice fully paid with a 20.00 credit balance
Test_Steps: 1. Initiate refund of 20.00 | 2. Select method and reason | 3. Confirm
Expected_Result: Refund posts, credit balance returns to zero, refund transaction recorded with method, reason and approver

Title: Refund cannot exceed available credit or net paid amount
Preconditions: Invoice with credit balance of 20.00
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt refund of 50.00 | 2. Save
Expected_Result: Refund is blocked or capped at 20.00; system prevents refunding more than was paid

Title: Refund on a voided invoice is prevented
Preconditions: Invoice already voided
Test_Steps: 1. Open voided invoice | 2. Attempt refund
Expected_Result: Refund action is unavailable or blocked; system explains the invoice is voided

Title: Post a credit adjustment to a finalized invoice
Preconditions: Finalized invoice with balance 105.00
Test_Steps: 1. Create credit adjustment 25.00 with reason | 2. Confirm | 3. Verify balance
Expected_Result: Balance reduces to 80.00; adjustment is a separate immutable transaction; original lines unchanged; audited

Title: Debit adjustment increases balance and requires authorization
Preconditions: Finalized invoice; debit adjustment policy requires approval
Test_Steps: 1. Create debit adjustment 40.00 | 2. Provide reason and approval | 3. Verify
Expected_Result: Balance increases by 40.00 only after authorization; unauthorized attempt is blocked and logged

Title: Tax computed only on taxable line items
Preconditions: Invoice with taxable and tax-exempt items; tax 5%
Test_Steps: 1. Mark exempt items | 2. Compute tax | 3. Verify
Expected_Result: Tax computed only on taxable 100.00 equals 5.00; exempt items excluded; total reflects 155.00

Title: Tax exemption certificate suppresses tax for eligible patient
Preconditions: Patient flagged tax-exempt with valid certificate
Test_Steps: 1. Generate invoice for exempt patient | 2. Verify tax
Expected_Result: No tax applied; invoice records exemption reference; certificate validity is checked

Title: Tax rounding follows configured rule at line vs invoice level
Preconditions: Tax rate produces fractional cents across multiple lines
Test_Steps: 1. Compute tax per line | 2. Compute tax on subtotal | 3. Compare to config
Expected_Result: Tax aggregation matches configured level (line or invoice) consistently; rounding does not drift across totals

Title: Discount-before-tax vs tax-before-discount order produces correct total
Preconditions: Rule configures discount applied before tax
Test_Steps: 1. Apply 10% discount and 5% tax | 2. Verify order of operations
Expected_Result: Discount applied first (180.00) then tax (9.00) giving 189.00; order matches configured rule

Title: Decision table: payer-specific contract pricing overrides charge master
Preconditions: Payer contract defines negotiated rate for CBC at 18.00; charge master is 25.00
Test_Steps: 1. Bill CBC for patient with payer contract | 2. Bill CBC for self-pay | 3. Compare
Expected_Result: Contracted payer uses 18.00; self-pay uses 25.00; selection follows payer-rule precedence

Title: Pricing rule precedence: contract over bundle over base price
Preconditions: Item has base, bundle and contract prices defined
Test_Steps: 1. Evaluate item under each rule combination | 2. Confirm chosen price
Expected_Result: Engine applies highest-precedence rule (contract) when applicable; precedence order is deterministic

Title: Pairwise across patient class, payer, service type and location
Preconditions: Pricing varies by patient class, payer, service type and location
Test_Steps: 1. Price a service for each pairwise combination | 2. Verify selected price and rule
Expected_Result: Each combination resolves to the expected price; no combination yields a null or default-fallback price unexpectedly

Title: Quantity-based tiered pricing applies correct tier
Preconditions: Item priced 10 each for 1-9 units and 8 each for 10+ units
Test_Steps: 1. Bill quantity 9 | 2. Bill quantity 10 | 3. Verify unit price
Expected_Result: Quantity 9 prices at 10/unit; quantity 10 prices at 8/unit; tier boundary applied correctly

Title: Patient responsibility computed after insurance estimate
Preconditions: Invoice 200.00 with insurance covering 80% after 20.00 deductible
Test_Steps: 1. Apply insurance estimate | 2. Verify patient responsibility
Expected_Result: Insurance covers 144.00, patient owes 56.00; split is itemized and reconciles to total

Title: Claim denial reverts charges to patient responsibility
Preconditions: Claim submitted and pending for an invoice
Test_Steps: 1. Receive denial | 2. Process denial | 3. Verify balance reassignment
Expected_Result: Insurance portion reverts to patient responsibility; balance and statement update; denial reason recorded

Title: Expose invoice as FHIR Invoice resource with line items
Preconditions: FHIR endpoint enabled; finalized invoice exists
Test_Steps: 1. GET the FHIR Invoice resource | 2. Validate structure and lineItem entries
Expected_Result: Response is a valid FHIR Invoice with lineItem priceComponents, totalNet, totalGross and subject reference to the patient

Title: FHIR Invoice totalGross equals totalNet plus tax priceComponent
Preconditions: FHIR Invoice with a tax price component
Test_Steps: 1. Retrieve Invoice resource | 2. Sum priceComponents | 3. Compare to totalGross
Expected_Result: totalGross equals 105.00; priceComponent of type tax is present and correct

Title: FHIR ChargeItem links to service Encounter and Account
Preconditions: ChargeItem resources generated from encounter charges
Test_Steps: 1. GET ChargeItem | 2. Validate context and account references
Expected_Result: ChargeItem includes code, quantity, priceOverride or definition, context to Encounter and reference to Account

Title: Reject malformed FHIR Invoice POST with OperationOutcome
Preconditions: FHIR endpoint accepts Invoice create
Test_Steps: 1. POST an Invoice missing required status | 2. Inspect response
Expected_Result: Server returns 4xx with OperationOutcome detailing the missing required element; no resource is created

Title: Outbound DFT P03 charge message generated for posted charge
Preconditions: HL7 interface configured for detailed financial transactions
Test_Steps: 1. Post a billable charge | 2. Capture outbound HL7 message | 3. Validate segments
Expected_Result: DFT P03 message contains FT1 segments with transaction code, amount, and correct PID linkage; structure validates

Title: FT1 transaction amount and quantity map correctly from invoice line
Preconditions: Invoice line with quantity 2 unit price 25.00
Test_Steps: 1. Generate DFT P03 | 2. Inspect FT1-7 quantity and FT1-11 amount
Expected_Result: FT1 reflects quantity 2 and transaction amount 50.00 in correct fields and data types

Title: Malformed inbound payment ACK is rejected with NAK
Preconditions: HL7 listener expects payment acknowledgement
Test_Steps: 1. Send a malformed ACK with bad MSH | 2. Observe response
Expected_Result: Listener rejects with NAK/AE; no payment is posted; error logged with message control id

Title: Create invoice via REST API with valid payload
Preconditions: API credentials with billing scope
Test_Steps: 1. POST invoice payload | 2. Inspect response and persisted record
Expected_Result: API returns 201 with invoice id; persisted invoice matches payload; totals computed server-side

Title: Reject invoice creation without billing scope token
Preconditions: Token lacks billing scope
Test_Steps: 1. POST invoice with insufficient-scope token | 2. Inspect response
Expected_Result: API returns 403 Forbidden; no invoice created; attempt is audit-logged

Title: Idempotency: duplicate payment POST with same key posts once
Preconditions: API supports idempotency keys for payments
Test_Steps: 1. POST payment with idempotency key K | 2. Repeat identical POST with key K
Expected_Result: First POST posts payment; second returns the original result without creating a duplicate transaction

Title: Invoice and ledger transactions persist atomically
Preconditions: Direct DB access to billing schema in test env
Test_Steps: 1. Post a payment that updates invoice and ledger | 2. Force a failure mid-transaction | 3. Inspect tables
Expected_Result: Transaction rolls back fully; no orphan ledger row; invoice balance unchanged; atomicity preserved

Title: Concurrent payments on same invoice do not double-apply
Preconditions: Two sessions paying the same invoice simultaneously
Test_Steps: 1. Submit two concurrent payments of 105.00 each | 2. Inspect final balance
Expected_Result: Only one payment fully settles the invoice; the other is rejected or creates a credit; no negative balance; locking enforced

Title: Monetary fields stored as fixed-precision avoiding float drift
Preconditions: DB access to billing tables
Test_Steps: 1. Post amounts 0.1 and 0.2 in separate lines | 2. Sum at DB level
Expected_Result: Stored sum equals exactly 0.30 with no floating point drift; columns use decimal/numeric type

Title: Billing clerk cannot approve own write-off (segregation of duties)
Preconditions: Clerk has write-off create but not approve right
Test_Steps: 1. Clerk creates write-off above threshold | 2. Clerk attempts self-approval
Expected_Result: Self-approval is blocked; a separate authorized approver is required; segregation of duties enforced and audited

Title: Tampering with invoice total via API request is rejected
Preconditions: API recomputes totals server-side
Test_Steps: 1. POST invoice with manipulated grand total below line sum | 2. Inspect
Expected_Result: Server ignores client total and recomputes; mismatch rejected or corrected; tamper attempt logged

Title: Audit log captures all financial mutations with user and timestamp
Preconditions: Audit logging enabled for billing
Test_Steps: 1. Create, adjust, void and refund across an invoice | 2. Review audit log
Expected_Result: Each mutation logs actor, action, before/after values, timestamp and reason; log is immutable and queryable

Title: Invoice and payment screens are keyboard and screen-reader accessible
Preconditions: Billing UI loaded; screen reader available
Test_Steps: 1. Navigate invoice form by keyboard only | 2. Verify labels and focus order | 3. Check error announcements
Expected_Result: All controls reachable by keyboard; fields have labels; amount errors announced; focus order logical; contrast meets AA

Title: Exploratory session on rounding, currency and concurrency edge cases
Preconditions: Test environment with billing fully configured
Test_Steps: 1. Time-box 60 min exploration of rounding, multi-currency, refunds and concurrent edits | 2. Record anomalies
Expected_Result: Defects and inconsistencies are documented with repro steps; risk areas noted for follow-up scripted tests

Title: Statement PDF generation handles long line lists across pages
Preconditions: Patient with 40+ invoice lines across invoices
Test_Steps: 1. Generate statement PDF | 2. Inspect pagination and totals
Expected_Result: PDF paginates correctly; running totals carry over; final total correct; no truncated lines

Title: Refund method mismatch warning when original payment method differs
Preconditions: Original payment by card; refund requested as cash
Test_Steps: 1. Initiate refund | 2. Choose cash method | 3. Observe warning
Expected_Result: System warns or blocks method mismatch per policy; rationale captured; refund only proceeds with authorization

Title: Missing price for an active service triggers controlled fallback
Preconditions: Service active but no price configured for the patient context
Test_Steps: 1. Bill the service | 2. Observe handling
Expected_Result: Charge is flagged for pricing review rather than silently defaulting to zero; billing user is notified

Title: Net invoice balance can never go negative after combined discounts and adjustments
Preconditions: Invoice with stacked discount and credit adjustments
Test_Steps: 1. Apply discount and credit adjustments exceeding subtotal | 2. Inspect balance
Expected_Result: Balance is floored at zero or converts excess to patient credit; never displays a negative invoice balance
